display.purpose: Hero + section headlines. Uppercase, italic, tracking -0.04em.

label.purpose: Nav, buttons, form labels, kickers — uppercase tracked.

shadows.name: tactile-card
shadows.purpose: Single hard offset shadow for all raised panels. Collapse the current #4c1d95/#1e1b4b/#020617 drift into this.

shadows.name: tactile-button
shadows.purpose: Pressable button depth; shrinks to 2px + translateY(4px) on active.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single action color. Lime fill, near-black uppercase label, bottom depth border that compresses on press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #a3e635; color: #0c0c1f; font-family: 'Lexend Variable', Lexend, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 16px 40px; border: none; border-radius: 1rem; border-bottom: 6px solid #4d7c0f; transition: transform 0.12s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), background 0.12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #bef264; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(4px); border-bottom-width: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #ff3bc0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tactile Card
components.description: Raised panel with one hard offset shadow and a state-colored border.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #28283d; border: 2px solid #958da3; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 0 #1a1a2e; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-card-title { color: #e2e0fc; font-family: 'Lexend Variable', Lexend, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.125rem; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Dark recessed field; border lights to lime on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #0c0c1f; border: 2px solid #958da3; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 16px 20px; color: #e2e0fc; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6a6478; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #a3e635; }

components.name: State Pill
components.description: Level-card status pill. Colors encode state: complete=lime, current=magenta, locked=muted.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Lexend Variable', Lexend, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; } .ds-pill-current { background: rgba(255,59,192,0.2); color: #ff3bc0; border-color: rgba(255,59,192,0.3); }

components.name: Bottom Nav Item
components.description: Student bottom-nav link. Active = lime; idle = muted lavender.
components.css: .ds-navitem { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 8px 24px; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: rgba(204,195,218,0.6); font-family: 'Lexend Variable', Lexend, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-navitem:hover { color: #ccc3da; } .ds-navitem-active { color: #a3e635; } .ds-navicon { font-family: 'Material Symbols Outlined'; font-size: 1.875rem; font-variation-settings: "FILL" 1; }

narrative.overview: Word-O-Matic is a vocabulary playground disguised as a game console. The base is a deep indigo-black stage lifted from a Material 3 dark theme, but the personality comes from hard, offset, no-blur 'tactile' shadows that make every card and button feel like a physical game piece. Bright arcade lime is the single player-highlight color; lavender, electric violet, and hot magenta are the system chrome. The system rejects soft SaaS minimalism, gradient text, glassmorphism, and the muted-cream AI default — and rejects the ad-hoc neobrutalist drift currently on the public landing page.
keyCharacteristics: Deep indigo-black canvas (#111125) with layered surfaces for depth.
One hard offset shadow per raised surface — never soft blur, never a different shadow color per component.
A single action/highlight accent: arcade lime.
Lexend (geometric, heavy) for display + UI; Plus Jakarta Sans for body.
Material Symbols Outlined for iconography (filled when active).

rules.name: The One Pop Color Rule
rules.body: Arcade lime is the only action/highlight color on any screen. Violet, magenta, peach are chrome, not calls to action.

rules.name: The Token-Only Rule
rules.body: Build every surface with the named Material 3 tokens. Never reach for raw zinc/slate/purple defaults. The public landing page violates this and must be brought on-system.

rules.name: The Black-Uppercase Rule
rules.body: Small UI text is Lexend 900, uppercase, tracked — the game HUD voice for nav, buttons, labels, kickers.

rules.name: The One Tactile Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every raised surface uses the same hard offset shadow color. Never mix #4c1d95/#1a1a2e/#1e1b4b/#020617 across files.

dos: Do build every surface from the named Material 3 tokens.
Do use arcade lime as the single action/highlight color.
Do give every raised surface one hard, zero-blur offset shadow in the single tactile-shadow color.
Do write small UI text as Lexend 900 uppercase, tracked.
Do drive card/chip appearance from explicit state (locked/current/complete).
donts: Don't build the landing page with raw zinc/slate/purple/green Tailwind defaults — Auth/Homepage.jsx is off-system.
Don't drift the tactile shadow color across #4c1d95/#1a1a2e/#1e1b4b/#020617.
Don't mix radii arbitrarily — standardize on the token scale.
Don't use soft blurred shadows, gradient text, side-stripe borders, or glassmorphism.
Don't label a surface 'Terminal' without a terminal visual language.
Don't leave lime untokenized — promote lime-400 to the accent token.
